name: GOLFTEC Dayton
about: GOLFTEC Dayton is a specialized golf training facility focused on technology-driven swing analysis and coaching. The venue utilizes advanced simulators and launch monitors to provide detailed feedback on ball and club tracking, catering to golfers seeking serious improvement. Pricing is typically based on package deals or hourly bay rates, making it suitable for both individual practice sessions and structured lessons with certified instructors.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Trackman technology for precise swing analysis
Professional coaching tailored to individual skill levels
Detailed performance data and shot tracking

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium dual radar system for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary clubs and equipment for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as GOLFTEC focuses on golf instruction without on-site dining facilities.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulation typically takes 2-3 hours depending on the pace of play and group size.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes young golfers with age-appropriate coaching equipment.
